seo.title: Web Design & Local SEO Services in Nova Scotia | Hatt Digital
seo.description: Web design, redesigns, local SEO, care plans, and online booking for Nova Scotia businesses. Straightforward services built to bring you more customers.

hero.heading: What I build for **your business.**
hero.lead: Straightforward web services with one goal: getting more customers through your door. No upsells you don't need.

list.heading: What I build — and what it does for your business.
list.intro: Every service below is here for one reason: to help more local customers find you, trust you, and get in touch. Mix and match, or start simple and grow later.

items.title: New business websites
items.body: A brand-new, custom-built site designed around your business and the customers you want to reach. The outcome: a professional first impression that turns visitors into enquiries instead of sending them to a competitor.

items.title: Website redesigns
items.body: If your current site is slow, dated, or hard to use on a phone, it’s quietly costing you customers. I rebuild it into something modern that actually works — keeping what’s good and fixing what isn’t.

items.title: Contractor & service-business websites
items.body: Sites built for trades and local services. Clear service lists, obvious trust signals, and click-to-call buttons, so the people searching for what you do end up calling you — not the next name on the list.

items.title: Mobile-friendly design
items.body: Your site should look clean and be easy to use on a phone, because that’s where most customers will check your business first. Every build is designed for the small screen before the big one.

items.title: Local SEO setup
items.body: The basics that help nearby customers find you on Google — clean page titles, location wording, Google Business Profile support, mobile speed, and proper site structure. Built in, not sold as an upsell.

items.title: Contact & quote forms
items.body: Simple forms that make it effortless to request a quote or send a message. Often the difference between a visit that goes nowhere and a real lead in your inbox.

items.title: Website launch & support
items.body: I handle the technical launch, double-check everything works, and show you how it all fits together. Then I’m still around when you need a change down the road.

items.title: CMS / editable content
items.body: Want to update your own text or images later? I can set the site up so you can make simple edits yourself, without touching code or paying for every little change.

items.title: Care & updates
items.body: An optional monthly plan that keeps everything running — hosting, security, backups, and small content changes — so you never have to think about your site’s upkeep again. Cancel anytime.

pricing_mini.heading: Not sure which one fits?
pricing_mini.body: Tell me your goals and budget and I’ll point you to the right option — then build a fair quote around the actual project.

who.heading: Web design built for local trades, services & small businesses.
who.intro: Pages tailored to specific industries and areas around Nova Scotia — with the problems, trust signals, and calls-to-action that matter for each one.

cta.heading: Ready to make your website easier to trust and easier to contact?
cta.body: Tell me about your business and I’ll come back with honest advice and a clear, flat quote — free.
